info.title: BeatLeader API. Get various Beat Saber information.
info.description: Retrieves players, scores, rankings, maps, leaderboards and much more for Beat Saber.

get.summary: Retrieve a list of nominations for particular leaderboard
get.description: Authenticated player Beasties nominations.

get.summary: Retrieve a list of nominations for particular leaderboard
get.description: Authenticated player Beasties nominations.

get.summary: Retrieve a list of player nominations that became finalists
get.description: Authenticated player Beasties nominations filtered to only finalists.

200.description: List of finalist nominations retrieved successfully

post.summary: Nominate a map for Besties Awards
post.description: Nominates provided leaderboard map for mapping awards in selected category

get.description: Fetches a paginated and optionally filtered list of clans (group of players). Filters include sorting by performance points, search, name, rank, and more.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of players per page, default is 10

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Represents the order in which values will be sorted.

schema.description: Represents the order in which values will be sorted.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific clan by tag
get.description: Fetches details of a specific clan identified by its tag.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Tag of the clan to retrieve details for

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of players per page, default is 10

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort players by, default is Pp

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order of sorting, default is Desc

schema.description: Represents the order in which values will be sorted.

parameters.name: primary
parameters.description: Whether to include only players for whom this clan is primary, default is false

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific clan by ID
get.description: Fetches details of a specific clan identified by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the clan to retrieve details for

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of players per page, default is 10

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort players by, default is Pp

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order of sorting, default is Desc

schema.description: Represents the order in which values will be sorted.

parameters.name: primary
parameters.description: Whether to include only players for whom this clan is primary, default is false

get.description: Fetches ranked maps(maps that can be captured on the global map) for where players of clan made scores identified by its tag, with optional sorting and filtering.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Tag of the clan to retrieve maps for

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of maps per page, default is 10

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort maps by, default is Pp

parameters.name: leaderboardContext
parameters.description: Context of the leaderboard, default is General

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order of sorting, default is Desc

schema.description: Represents the order in which values will be sorted.

parameters.name: playedStatus
parameters.description: Filter by played status of current player

get.description: Fetches ranked maps(maps that can be captured on the global map) for where players of clan made scores identified by its ID, with optional sorting and filtering.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1

parameters.name: count

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort maps by, default is Pp

parameters.name: leaderboardContext
parameters.description: Context of the leaderboard, default is General

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order of sorting, default is Desc

schema.description: Represents the order in which values will be sorted.

parameters.name: playedStatus
parameters.description: Filter by played status of current player

get.description: Fetches a list of player's performance metrics and various stats saved daily

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Clan's unique identifier

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Amount of days to include

404.description: No history saved for the given clan ID

get.summary: Retrieve clan details for the skill triangle
get.description: Fetches ranked maps(maps that can be captured on the global map) for where players of clan made scores identified by its tag, with optional sorting and filtering.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the clan to retrieve maps for

get.description: Fetches a global map showing clan captured maps and rankings.

get.summary: Reset the current player level and prestige
get.description: Reset the current logged in player level and prestige

get.summary: Reset the current player level and prestige
get.description: Reset the current logged in player level and prestige
Fetches details of a leaderboard identified by its ID, with optional sorting and filtering for scores.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the leaderboard to retrieve details for

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Scores page number for pagination, default is 1

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of scores per page, default is 10

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort scores by, default is Rank

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order of sorting, default is Desc

schema.description: Represents the order in which values will be sorted.

parameters.name: scoreStatus
parameters.description: Filter for score status, default is None

parameters.name: leaderboardContext
parameters.description: Context of the leaderboard, default is General

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Filter for specific countries (country code, comma separated)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term to filter scores by player name or clan

parameters.name: modifiers
parameters.description: Modifiers to filter scores by (comma separated)

parameters.name: friends
parameters.description: Whether to include only scores from friends, default is false

parameters.name: voters
parameters.description: Whether to include only scores from voters, default is false

parameters.name: clanTag
parameters.description: Whether to include only scores from clan, default is false

parameters.name: hmds
parameters.description: Comma-separated range to filter by hmd (headset), default is null

parameters.name: prediction
parameters.description: Whether to include predicted scores, default is false

get.summary: Retrieve clan rankings for a leaderboard
get.description: Fetches clan rankings for a leaderboard identified by its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the leaderboard to retrieve clan rankings for

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of rankings per page, default is 10

get.description: Fetches a paginated and optionally filtered list of leaderboards (Beat Saber maps).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of leaderboards per page, default is 10

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort leaderboards by, default is None

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order of sorting, default is Desc

schema.description: Represents the order in which values will be sorted.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term to filter leaderboards by song, author or mapper name

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of leaderboards to filter, default is All

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Mode to filter leaderboards by (Standard, OneSaber, etc...)

parameters.name: difficulty
parameters.description: Difficulty to filter leaderboards by (Easy, Normal, Hard, Expert, ExpertPlus)

parameters.name: mapType
parameters.description: Map type to filter leaderboards by

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

parameters.name: allTypes
parameters.description: Operation to filter all types, default is Any

parameters.name: mapRequirements
parameters.description: Requirements to filter leaderboards by, default is Ignore

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

parameters.name: allRequirements
parameters.description: Operation to filter all requirements, default is Any

parameters.name: songStatus
parameters.description: Song status to filter leaderboards by, default is None

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

parameters.name: leaderboardContext
parameters.description: Context of the leaderboard, default is General

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

parameters.name: mapCreator
parameters.description: Map creator, human by default

parameters.name: mytype
parameters.description: My type to filter leaderboards by, default is None

parameters.name: stars_from
parameters.description: Minimum stars to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: stars_to
parameters.description: Maximum stars to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: accrating_from
parameters.description: Minimum accuracy rating to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: accrating_to
parameters.description: Maximum accuracy rating to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: passrating_from
parameters.description: Minimum pass rating to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: passrating_to
parameters.description: Maximum pass rating to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: techrating_from
parameters.description: Minimum tech rating to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: techrating_to
parameters.description: Maximum tech rating to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Start date to filter leaderboards by (timestamp)

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: End date to filter leaderboards by (timestamp)

parameters.name: date_range
parameters.description: Type of the date filter, default by map upload date

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Types of leaderboards to filter, default is null(All). Same as type but multiple

parameters.name: playlistIds
parameters.description: Playlits Ids to filter, default is null

parameters.name: mappers
parameters.description: Filter maps from a specific mappers. BeatSaver profile ID list, comma separated, default is null

get.summary: Retrieve scores graph for a leaderboard
get.description: Fetches the scores graph for a leaderboard identified by its ID. Compact endpoint to use in the leaderboard data visualizations.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the leaderboard to retrieve score graph for

parameters.name: leaderboardContext
parameters.description: Leaderboard context, general by default.

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

get.summary: Retrieve a list of known mappers
get.description: Fetches a paginated and optionally filtered list of mappers.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of mappers per page, default is 10

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Represents the order in which values will be sorted.

schema.description: Represents the order in which values will be sorted.

get.description: Provides a list of Beat Saber modifiers and their associated score multiplier values. This is legacy support, for the recent values please use `modifierValues` and `modifierRatings` on leaderboards.
Refreshes the Patreon link for the current user, updating their Patreon tier and roles based on the latest information.

400.description: Bad request, no existing Patreon link

401.description: Unauthorized, user not found or not logged in

parameters.name: leaderboardContext

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

404.description: Scores not found for the given player ID

parameters.name: stats

parameters.name: keepOriginalId

parameters.description: Leaderboard context, 'general' by default

get.description: Retrieves a BeatLeader profile data with linked Discord profile.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Discord profile ID

get.description: Retrieves a BeatLeader profile data with linked BeatSaver profile.

parameters.name: id

get.description: Retrieves a BeatLeader profile data with linked Patreon profile.

parameters.description: Patreon profile ID

get.description: Fetches a paginated and optionally filtered list of players. Filters include sorting by performance points, search, country, maps type, platform, and more.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sorting criteria, default is 'pp' (performance points)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of players per page, default is 50

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for filtering players by username

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order of sorting, default is descending

schema.description: Represents the order in which values will be sorted.

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of countries for filtering

parameters.name: mapsType
parameters.description: Type of maps to consider, default is 'ranked'

parameters.name: ppType
parameters.description: Type of performance points, default is 'general'

parameters.name: leaderboardContext
parameters.description: Context of the leaderboard, default is 'General'

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

parameters.name: friends
parameters.description: Flag to filter only friends, default is false

parameters.name: pp_range
parameters.description: Comma-separated range to filter by amount of pp, default is null

parameters.name: acc_pp_range
parameters.description: Comma-separated range to filter by amount of acc pp, default is null

parameters.name: pass_pp_range
parameters.description: Comma-separated range to filter by amount of pass pp, default is null

parameters.name: tech_pp_range
parameters.description: Comma-separated range to filter by amount of tech pp, default is null

parameters.name: score_range
parameters.description: Comma-separated range to filter by total score count, default is null

parameters.name: ranked_score_range
parameters.description: Comma-separated range to filter by ranked score count, default is null

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Comma-separated range to filter by platform value, default is null

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Comma-separated range to filter by role, default is null

parameters.name: hmd
parameters.description: Comma-separated range to filter by hmd (headset), default is null

parameters.name: activityPeriod
parameters.description: Value in seconds to filter by the last score time, default is null

parameters.name: firstScoreTime
parameters.description: Unix timestamp to filter by the first score time, default is null

parameters.name: recentScoreTime
parameters.description: Unix timestamp to filter by the first score time, default is null

parameters.name: mapperStatus
parameters.description: Mapper status filter, default is null

parameters.name: banned
parameters.description: Flag to filter only banned players, default is null

get.description: Retrieves a chronological list of events player with such ID took part of.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the player

200.description: Returns list of events player took part

get.summary: Get player' followers and players they follow
get.description: Retrieves an info about player' followers such as count and 3 closest followers. Also 3 most followed players this player follows

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the player

200.description: Returns brief info about player followers.

get.description: Retrieves a full list of player' followers and players this player follow.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the player

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of players per page, default is 10

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Relationship type: followers or following

get.summary: Get info about the clan this player founded
get.description: Retrieves an information about the clan this player created and manage.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the player

200.description: Returns brief info about the clan

404.description: Player not found or player doesn't found any clans

get.summary: Get ranked maps this player mapped
get.description: Retrieves a list of maps this player created that later became ranked and give PP now.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the player

parameters.name: leaderboardContext
parameters.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

200.description: Returns brief stats about maps this player ranked, like count, total PP gained, etc...

get.summary: Get ranked maps this player mapped
get.description: Retrieves a list of maps this player created that later became ranked and give PP now.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the player

parameters.name: leaderboardContext
parameters.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

200.description: Returns brief stats about maps this player ranked, like count, total PP gained, etc...

get.description: Fetches a paginated list of scores for a specified player ID. Allows filtering by various criteria like date, difficulty, mode, and more.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Player's unique identifier

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sorting criteria for scores, default is by 'pp'

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Order of sorting, default is descending

schema.description: Represents the order in which values will be sorted.

parameters.name: thenSortBy
parameters.description: Additional sorting criteria for scores tied by the first sort, default is by 'date'

parameters.name: thenOrder
parameters.description: Order of additional sorting, default is descending

schema.description: Represents the order in which values will be sorted.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of scores per page, default is 8

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter scores by search term in song name, author or mapper. Default is null

parameters.name: noSearchSort
parameters.description: Disabled scores sort by search relevance index

parameters.name: diff
parameters.description: Filter scores by map difficulty(Easy, Expert, Expert+, etc), default is null

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Filter scores by map characteristic(Standard, OneSaber, etc), default is null

parameters.name: requirements
parameters.description: Filter scores by map requirements, default is 'None'

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

parameters.name: scoreStatus
parameters.description: Filter scores by score status, default is 'None'

parameters.name: leaderboardContext
parameters.description: Filter scores by leaderboard context, default is 'General'

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter scores by map status, default is null

parameters.name: hmd
parameters.description: Filter scores by headset, default is null

parameters.name: modifiers
parameters.description: Filter scores by modifiers(GN, SF, etc), default is null

parameters.name: stars_from
parameters.description: Filter scores on ranked maps with stars greater than, default is null

parameters.name: stars_to
parameters.description: Filter scores on ranked maps with stars lower than, default is null

parameters.name: acc_from
parameters.description: Filter scores on score accuracy greater than, default is null

parameters.name: acc_to
parameters.description: Filter scores on score accuracy lower than, default is null

parameters.name: time_from
parameters.description: Filter scores made after unix timestamp, default is null

parameters.name: time_to
parameters.description: Filter scores made before unix timestamp, default is null

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: Show only scores from the event with ID, default is null

parameters.name: includeIO
parameters.description: Include score improvement and offsets, default is false

parameters.name: playlistIds
parameters.description: Playlits Ids to filter, default is null

404.description: Scores not found for the given player ID

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

parameters.name: leaderboardContext
parameters.description: Context of the leaderboard, default is General

schema.description: Bitmask enum. Values can be combined using bitwise OR operator.

parameters.name: mapCreator
parameters.description: Map creator, human by default

parameters.name: mytype
parameters.description: My type to filter leaderboards by, default is None

parameters.name: stars_from
parameters.description: Minimum stars to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: stars_to
parameters.description: Maximum stars to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: accrating_from
parameters.description: Minimum accuracy rating to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: accrating_to
parameters.description: Maximum accuracy rating to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: passrating_from
parameters.description: Minimum pass rating to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: passrating_to
parameters.description: Maximum pass rating to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: techrating_from
parameters.description: Minimum tech rating to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: techrating_to
parameters.description: Maximum tech rating to filter leaderboards by

parameters.name: duration_from
parameters.description: Minimum duration to filter leaderboards by in seconds

parameters.name: duration_to
parameters.description: Maximum duration to filter leaderboards by in seconds

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Start date to filter leaderboards by (timestamp)

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: End date to filter leaderboards by (timestamp)

parameters.name: date_range
parameters.description: Type of the date filter, default by map upload date

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Types of leaderboards to filter, default is null(All). Same as type but multiple

parameters.name: playlistIds
parameters.description: Types of leaderboards to filter, default is null(All). Same as type but multiple

parameters.name: mappers
parameters.description: Filter maps from a specific mappers. BeatSaver profile ID list, comma separated, default is null

parameters.name: overrideCurrentId
parameters.description: Override current user ID

get.description: Fetches a paginated and optionally filtered list of Beat Saber maps.

parameters.description: Context of the leaderboard, default is General

get.description: Retrieves all available task statuses

post.description: Creates a new task status (admin only)

put.description: Updates an existing task status (admin only)

get.description: Retrieves all available task tags

post.description: Creates a new task tag (admin only)

put.description: Updates an existing task tag (admin only)

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of work tasks with filtering options
Retrieves full details of a specific task

put.description: Updates an existing task (creator or admin only)

post.description: Creates a new generic work task
Creates a new bug report task

delete.description: Removes a player's vote from a task (admin only)

get.description: Retrieves paginated comments for a task

post.description: Adds a comment to a task

put.description: Edits a comment (author or admin only)

delete.description: Deletes a comment (author or admin only)

post.description: Adds a tag to a task

delete.description: Removes a tag from a task

post.description: Assigns a player to work on a task (admin only)

delete.description: Removes a player from a task (admin only)

get.description: Gets all tasks assigned to the current user
Retrieves the change history for a task

post.description: Uploads a file attachment to a task

delete.description: Deletes an attachment (creator or admin only)
